entries.title: Plated Bark
entries.description: Gain +2 base AV.

entries.title: Mirrored Leaves
entries.description: DEX save to reflect Beam attacks back at the source. DIS when hiding.

entries.title: Barbed Bark
entries.description: Opponents who miss melee attacks against you suffer d4 damage.

entries.title: Shield Vines
entries.description: Spend two points of DEX to grow a Shield Vine, adding +1 Armour Defence. DEX loss cannot heal until you choose to shed all vines.

entries.title: Lashing Vines
entries.description: Spend two points of STR to grow a Lashing Vine, adding +1 melee attack (d6) per round. STR loss cannot heal until you choose to shed all vines.

entries.title: Vantablooms
entries.description: Your light-absorbing vantablooms create a cloud of shadows around you. Ranged attacks have DIS to hit you. You have ADV to hide from pursuers.

entries.title: Empathogen Pollen
entries.description: Once per day, release a cloud of empathogenic pollen. Biological creatures caught in the cloud must EGO save or become friendly and harmless for d6 rounds.

entries.title: Soporific Pollen
entries.description: Once per day, release a cloud of soporific pollen. Biological creatures caught in the cloud must EGO save or fall asleep for d6 rounds.

entries.title: Neurotoxic Pollen
entries.description: Once per day, release a cloud of neurotoxic pollen. Biological creatures caught in the cloud must CON save or be reduced to 1 HP.

entries.title: Toxic Sap
entries.description: You emit one dose of a poisonous (d10 TOX) sap per day. Creatures who bite you or eat any part of your body must CON save vs a d10 TOX attack.

entries.title: Vampiric Roots
entries.description: You can root yourself on Biological creatures, dealing d4 damage per round. You heal HP equal to the damage caused. The target must STR save to tear you off.

entries.title: Luftpods
entries.description: You sprout pods full of lighter-than-air gas. You can fly in the air, slowly and predictably, and can act as a parachute to one other character.

entries.title: Tesla Blossom
entries.description: Spend two points of CON to grow a Tesla Blossom, which makes an extra ranged electrical attack (d6, ADV to hit Synthetic creatures) every combat round. CON loss cannot heal until you shed all Tesla Blossoms.

entries.title: Seed Cannon
entries.description: Spend two points of DEX to grow a Seed Cannon, which makes an extra ranged attack (d6) every combat round. DEX loss cannot heal until you shed all Seed Cannons.

entries.title: Medicinal Fruit
entries.description: Each day you sprout a golden fruit. It can be eaten as a food ration, healing d10 + CON bonus HP. Your maximum fruit cannot exceed your Level. You cannot eat your own fruit.

entries.title: Sticky Sap
entries.description: You emit one dose of a glutinous sap per day. When spread on a surface, it acts as a strong contact glue. Creatures must STR save or be stuck fast to the surface. Saltwater dissolves the bond.

entries.title: Sapling Retainers
entries.description: Spend d4 points of CON to create an equal number of Sapling Retainers (Lvl 1, AV 12, ML +1, Atk d6). They serve you for the rest of the day before withering.

entries.title: Blast Pods
entries.description: Each day you sprout an explosive pod (d10, blast). Your maximum pods cannot exceed your Level.

entries.title: Grafting
entries.description: You may graft part of a Biological creature to your branches or trunk, gaining whatever extra attack or bonus is appropriate. For each day the grafted part stays alive, lose 1 point of CON.

entries.title: Puppeteer Roots
entries.description: You may burrow your roots into the nervous system of a Biological creature. If the target fails an EGO save, you can control their movements. Damage taken by the controlled creature is split between both entities.
